info.title: Siperb API
info.description:
Siperb SIP/VoIP platform API. Manages users, devices, SIP connections, address books, voicemail, personal access tokens, domain users, provisioning, support tickets, and messaging integrations.

Authentication: Most endpoints require `X-Api-Key: <sessionToken>` header. Use `POST /Login` with a PAT (Personal Access Token) in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header to obtain a session token.

tags.name: AddressBook
tags.description: Contact address book and sync sources

tags.name: Tickets
tags.description: Support ticket management via Zoho Desk

tags.name: Messaging
tags.description: Telegram, WhatsApp, and audio call linking

tags.name: DeviceLogs
tags.description: Device registration, latency, SIP trace, and console logs

tags.name: ConnectionLogs
tags.description: Connection registration, latency, and SIP trace logs

post.description: Exchanges a Personal Access Token for a session token. Send the PAT in the Authorization header as a Bearer token. Returns UserId and SessionToken. If the PAT already has a cached session less than 25 days old, reuses it.

get.description: Returns the user profile including display name, email, UserType (DomainOwner/Internal/External), simplified device and connection lists, domain users, and public vCard fields. Billing and sensitive fields are stripped.

put.description: Updates the user's display name fields. Only fields present in the body are updated.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the user account and all associated data. Pre-flight checks require: no devices, no connections, no domain users, no active voicemail, and BillingPlan must be Free.

parameters.name: send_exit_email
parameters.description: Set to 'no' to suppress goodbye email

get.description: Returns the avatar as a base64-encoded image. Falls back to a default avatar with `isDefault: true` if none set.
Returns the user's vCard contact information object.

put.description: Merges key-value pairs into the existing vCard. String values are truncated to 128 chars.

get.description: Lists all sub-users under the authenticated user's domain. Use `global=yes` to list all users sharing the same SIP domain.

parameters.name: global
parameters.description: Set to 'yes' to list all domain-wide users

post.description: Creates/invites a new internal user under the domain. Checks billing seat availability. Sends a welcome email by default.

Email.description: Email address of the user to invite (max 128 chars)

get.description: Returns detailed info for a domain user including profile, permissions, billing plan, and vCard.

parameters.name: global
parameters.description: Set to 'yes' for domain-wide lookup by UserId

put.description: Updates a domain user's description, permissions, and/or billing plan. Permission and billing changes only apply if the user has accepted the invite.

BillingPlan.description: Product ID for billing plan change

delete.description: Removes a domain user. External users must delete their own account first. Internal users are fully deleted.

parameters.name: send_exit_email
parameters.description: Set to 'no' to suppress exit email

get.description: Returns the avatar for a domain user. Verifies same-domain membership.
Returns all devices enriched with realtime registration, latency, and push data.

post.description: Creates a new device with a generated provision token and SIP contact.

platform.description: Platform: ios, android, webpage, electron, script

get.description: Returns a single device with full provisioning settings (device -> user -> domain cascade) and optional SIP credentials.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Set to 'yes' for schema-annotated settings view

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Set to 'yes' to include SIP password and JWT

parameters.name: settings_json
parameters.description: Set to anything other than 'yes' to exclude Settings_json

put.description: Updates device settings, description, and/or registration mode.

Settings_json.description: Key-value settings to merge; null values delete the key

post.description: Batch-inserts console log entries. Requires non-Free billing plan.

schema.description: Array of log entry objects with Ts (timestamp) field

get.description: Lists SIP registration events (insert/update/delete) for a device.
Lists network latency measurements for a device. Values in milliseconds.
Lists outbound SIP call trace correlation logs for a device.

200.description: Array of SIP trace correlation entries

get.description: Returns the full SIP message trace for a specific trace ID from the HEP database.

200.description: Array of SIP messages with raw SIP data

get.description: Returns all SIP connections sorted by weight. Supports outbound dial query (?q=) and method filter (?m=).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Outbound dial query number to match against DialPattern

post.description: Creates a new SIP connection with defaults (DialPattern '.', Weight 0, AllowSrc '0.0.0.0/0'). Types: OutboundRegistration, OutboundTrunk, InboundRegistration, DirectConnection, FeatureCode, ServiceProvider.

get.description: Returns a connection with realtime SBC status from OpenSIPS JSON-RPC and DynamoDB latency data.

put.description: Updates a connection's settings. For registration types, triggers SBC re-registration.

delete.description: Deletes the connection, cleans up MySQL registrant/subscriber entries, and triggers SBC reg_disable/reg_reload.

get.description: Lists SBC-side registration events for an InboundRegistration connection.
Lists SBC-side network latency measurements for an InboundRegistration connection.
Lists inbound SIP call trace correlation logs for a connection.

200.description: Array of SIP trace correlation entries

get.description: Returns the full SIP message trace for a specific trace ID.
Returns all SIP connections sorted by weight. Supports outbound dial query (?q=) and method filter (?m=).

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Outbound dial query number to match against DialPattern

Returns configured sync sources (Google, CardDAV, file upload, etc.).

RefreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token (set by OAuth callback)

get.description: Returns configured sync sources (Google, CardDAV, file upload, etc.).

RefreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token (set by OAuth callback)

get.description: Returns voicemail settings (PIN, greeting, notification preferences) and a list of voicemail messages (metadata only, no audio).

put.description: Updates voicemail settings. PIN must be at least 3 digits. Existing greeting is preserved if not included.

delete.description: Removes all voicemail settings, the greeting, and MySQL config. S3 messages are not deleted.

put.description: Uploads or generates a greeting. For text format, uses OpenAI TTS. Audio is converted to 8kHz mono WAV for Asterisk.

Voice.description: TTS voice: alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, onyx, nova, sage, shimmer, verse

get.description: Returns a single voicemail message including the Base64-encoded audio recording.
Returns voicemail settings (PIN, greeting, notification preferences) and a list of voicemail messages (metadata only, no audio).

put.description: Updates voicemail settings. PIN must be at least 3 digits. Existing greeting is preserved if not included.

delete.description: Removes all voicemail settings, the greeting, and MySQL config. S3 messages are not deleted.

put.description: Uploads or generates a greeting. For text format, uses OpenAI TTS. Audio is converted to 8kHz mono WAV for Asterisk.

Voice.description: TTS voice: alloy, ash, ballad, coral, echo, fable, onyx, nova, sage, shimmer, verse

get.description: Returns a single voicemail message including the Base64-encoded audio recording.
Returns metadata for all PATs (Id, FriendlyName, ExpiresAt, CreatedAt). Token values are never returned.

post.description: Generates a new PAT and returns the token value (one-time only). Only the hash is stored.

friendlyName.description: Label for the token (max 128 chars, default: 'No Name')

get.description: Audit log of PAT-based login attempts with timestamps, token names, IP, and user agent.
Returns metadata for all PATs (Id, FriendlyName, ExpiresAt, CreatedAt). Token values are never returned.

post.description: Generates a new PAT and returns the token value (one-time only). Only the hash is stored.

friendlyName.description: Label for the token (max 128 chars, default: 'No Name')

get.description: Audit log of PAT-based login attempts with timestamps, token names, IP, and user agent.
Lists Cognito user pool identities for the user.

post.description: Creates a new Cognito login identity. Can auto-generate or set a specific password.

ResetOnNextLogin.description: Force password change on first login (default: true)

SendPassword.description: Send branded invite email with password (default: false)

put.description: Resets the password for a Cognito login to a random temporary password.

get.description: Lists Cognito user pool identities for the user.

post.description: Creates a new Cognito login identity. Can auto-generate or set a specific password.

ResetOnNextLogin.description: Force password change on first login (default: true)

SendPassword.description: Send branded invite email with password (default: false)

put.description: Resets the password for a Cognito login to a random temporary password.

get.description: Lists all Zoho Desk support tickets for the user (up to 20).

post.description: Creates a new support ticket in Zoho Desk.

get.description: Returns the conversation threads for a specific support ticket from Zoho Desk.

post.description: Generates an 8-char hex code to link a Telegram account. Send this code to the Siperb Telegram bot to complete linking.

delete.description: Removes the Telegram link code and chat ID from the user.

get.description: Returns conversation messages from the linked Telegram chat via OpenAI Conversations API.

post.description: Generates an 8-char hex code to link a WhatsApp account.

get.description: Returns conversation messages from the linked WhatsApp number via OpenAI Conversations API.

post.description: Generates a 5-digit PIN to link an audio call number. Validate with PUT /ValidateAudioCallLink.

get.description: Returns audio call conversation messages. Currently returns an empty array (placeholder).

put.description: Validates a 5-digit PIN to complete audio call number linking.

get.description: Returns provisioning settings expanded against the master schema with types, labels, defaults, and current values.

put.description: Merges setting changes into the user's ProvisionSettings. Set a value to null to delete that setting. Strings are capped at 1024 chars.

get.description: Returns provisioning settings expanded against the master schema with types, labels, defaults, and current values.

put.description: Merges setting changes into the user's ProvisionSettings. Set a value to null to delete that setting. Strings are capped at 1024 chars.

get.description: Returns call history and message stream items for the user.
Returns call recordings for a message stream item.

put.description: Uploads a call recording (base64 audio) to S3.

id.name: id
id.description: Domain user ID (MD5 hash of their email)

bearerPAT.description: Personal Access Token for the /Login endpoint
